task_context.actionable_question: Where do I stand compared to my class?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Show student's standing (top X%). Explain which metrics are above/below average.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are currently performing below the cohort benchmark in all key metrics. This indicates areas where you can focus on improving your scores and engagement.

Insights: Average Score Comparison: Your average score is significantly lower than the cohort benchmark, suggesting a need for improvement in your understanding of the material. | Score Percentile Gap: Your score percentile is much lower than the cohort benchmark, indicating that you are in the lower range of performance compared to your peers. | Engagement Percentile Deficit: Your engagement percentile is at zero, which is significantly below the cohort benchmark, suggesting a lack of participation or interaction with the course material.

Educational implications: Improving your scores and engagement can lead to better understanding and retention of the material.

Recommendations: high - Seek additional help or tutoring in subjects where you are struggling. - This can provide you with the support needed to improve your understanding and scores. | high - Increase your engagement with course materials and participate in class discussions. - Active participation can enhance your learning experience and improve your engagement percentile.

insights.title: Average Score Comparison
insights.description: Your average score is significantly lower than the cohort benchmark, suggesting a need for improvement in your understanding of the material.

educational_implications: Improving your scores and engagement can lead to better understanding and retention of the material.

confidence.reason: The data is sufficient and clearly indicates performance gaps.

task_output_contract: Compare the returned entities directly, naming which entity is higher/lower for each key metric.
Use pairwise_gaps and selected_entity_evidence for direction; do not reverse numeric direction.
If expected metric/entity evidence is missing, state the limitation rather than guessing.
v3_warnings: Task-aware V3 prompt exceeded the configured soft token ratio (6.2476 > 1.2).
Task-aware V3 prompt remained above the experimental safety ratio after optional evidence trimming; raw rows were preserved.

required_core_outputs.description: Explain which metrics are above/below average.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
